items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian that searches your vault for tasks that contain dates, and generates a calendar in iCal format that can be imported into your preferred calendar application.
items.title: andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian that searches your vault for tasks that contain dates, and generates a calendar in iCal format that can be imported into your preferred calendar application.

items.content_html: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars
items.title: sytone/obsidian-queryallthethings: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars
